message:
refactor(extensions): remove redundant roots parameter from resolve_module_path

Complete the canonicalization cleanup by removing the now-unused plain
extension_roots parameter from resolve_module_path(), keeping only the
pre-canonicalized canonical_roots:

- Remove roots parameter from function signature and all 7 call sites
- Replace roots.is_empty() guards with canonical_roots.is_empty() in
  file:// URL resolution and scope monotonicity enforcement
- PiJsResolver no longer clones extension_roots, only canonical_extension_roots
- Test call sites updated to pass only canonical_roots

This is a natural follow-up to the safe_canonicalize() elimination work,
removing the last vestige of the dual-roots pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
